summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TratorShop dedicated admin authentication system. All admin auth features working perfectly with proper separation from regular user OAuth.

minor_issues.issue: Test endpoint returns 404 instead of 401 (existing test methodology issue)
minor_issues.impact: No functional impact - test specific issue

passed_tests: Admin login API works with correct credentials (admin@tratorshop.com / Admin@123)
Admin login API rejects wrong credentials with 401 status
Admin login API rejects non-existent admin with 401 status
Admin auth/me endpoint properly protected (returns 401 without token)
Admin auth/me endpoint works with valid admin token
Admin listings endpoint works with valid admin token
Admin users endpoint works with valid admin token
Admin logout endpoint works correctly
Admin login page loads correctly at /admin-login
Admin login form has all required elements with correct test IDs
Admin login with correct credentials redirects to /admin panel
Admin panel displays properly with all required elements
Admin panel has Anúncios and Usuários tabs
Admin panel shows Pendentes, Aprovados, Rejeitados tabs for listings
Admin panel tabs are clickable and functional
Admin panel Users tab loads and displays users correctly
Admin logout works and redirects to /admin-login
Admin routes are protected - accessing /admin without login redirects to /admin-login
Admin login rejects wrong credentials with error message
Admin login rejects non-existent admin with proper error handling
Regular user Google OAuth system still works independently
Regular user login page loads correctly with Google OAuth button
Navigation between admin and regular login works properly
Admin and regular authentication systems are completely separate
